name: My Protogen Engineer ⚙️
short_description: You've almost died, you lost your body. Gladly, you were saved by your old friend Xena, a genius engineer who lives on a desolate planet. Now it's time to recover and find a new goal in your life!
detailed_description:
My Protogen Engineer tells the story of Marwen, a Protogen mercenary who almost died on his last mission. Gladly, his teammates brought him to the only person who could save him - Xena. Being a very talented engineer, Xena saved Marwen's brain and transplanted it into a functional mechanical body. Now he has to adapt to his new life and find a new purpose, a new meaning to his life. But at least he's not alone, Xena will be there to help him!

Follow Marwen and Xena on this journey, find more about their common past and just spend time together with them!

This is a side-story happening in "My Furry Protogen" universe. If you would like to know more about it, check out the original games.

Features:

• Cute female protogen!

• HD fully original artworks.

• Relaxing atmosphere.

• Some personal drama, as usual.
